title: Chapter 41
text: About the Authors T iffany Roberts is the pseudonym for Tiffany and Robert Freund, a husband-and-wife writing duo. While Tiffany was born and bred in Idaho, Robert was a New York native who made the decision to fly across the county to be with her. Tiffany and Robert have always had a passion for reading and writing, and it was the dream to write books that they both shared that brought them closer. While they never gave up on this dream, work and kids came first until they were able to focus on moving their writing career along . Connect with us : Website: https:// authortiffanyroberts.wordpress.com Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/ AuthorTiffanyRoberts Sign up for our Newsletter !
